obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Page canvas, primary dark surface

void.$description: Void — Maximum depth, nav borders, icon outlines, image masks

carbon.$description: Carbon — Card surfaces, elevated panels one step above canvas

graphite.$description: Graphite — Hover/active surface lift, tertiary borders, input fields

smoke.$description: Smoke — Dividers, secondary surface tier, muted container backgrounds

ash.$description: Ash — Muted helper text, secondary nav labels, disabled copy

snow.$description: Snow — Primary text, headings, filled CTA background, hairline borders — the only non-structural color in the system

review-condensed.$description: Display headlines only — the 128px hero, 72px section openers. Ultra-condensed 900 weight with 0.8 line-height creates a compressed, manifesto-grade statement. The near-zero line-height at 128px is the signature: letters almost collide vertically, giving the type a carved-into-stone density. Free substitute: Anton or Bebas Neue at equivalent weight.

review.$description: Buttons, nav labels, subheadings, card titles, emphasized body. At 14–18px it functions as UI text with weight 700; at 32px weight 900 it serves as in-section headings. Slight negative tracking at small sizes (-0.01em) tightens the UI, while +0.02em at 32px opens the heading. Free substitute: Archivo Black or Space Grotesk Bold.

kalice.$description: Body copy, nav items, and any all-caps micro-text. The 0.04–0.06em letter-spacing is the technical-fingerprint detail — at 12px it reads as terminal/monospace-adjacent labels (think captcha, ticker, or command line), and at 16px it becomes technical documentation prose. Free substitute: JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono.

times-system.$description: Fallback body — appears as default browser rendering where custom faces haven't loaded. Do not design against this; treat as graceful degradation only.

obsidian-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, default section fill

carbon-card.$description: Surface level 1: Card surfaces, ecosystem tiles, nav pill background

graphite-elevated.$description: Surface level 2: Hover state, active nav, input field background, secondary borders

smoke-divider.$description: Surface level 3: Hairline dividers, tertiary container borders

snow-foreground.$description: Surface level 4: Primary text, filled CTA, active borders — the system's only non-neutral foreground
